User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Campus Connect platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's full email address, following domain conventions (e.g., @student.college.edu, @faculty.college.edu, @college.edu).

rollNumber.description: The student's unique roll number. Used for login.

facultyCode.description: The faculty member's unique code ID. Used for login.

role.description: The user's role within the platform.

department.description: The department the user belongs to.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents a course offered by the college.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

credits.description: The number of credits the course is worth.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Represents a student's enrollment in a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Enrollment entity.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Represents a student's attendance record for a specific course and date.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Attendance entity.

date.description: The date of the attendance record.

Timetable.title: Timetable
Timetable.description: Represents the timetable for a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Timetable entity.

dayOfWeek.description: The day of the week for the timetable slot.

startTime.description: The start time of the timetable slot.

endTime.description: The end time of the timetable slot.

room.description: The room where the class takes place.

meetingUrl.description: URL for the online class meeting.

semester.description: The semester for the timetable slot.

year.description: The year for the timetable slot.

Result.title: Result
Result.description: Represents a student's result for a course in a semester.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Result entity.

marks.description: The marks obtained by the student.

grade.description: The grade awarded to the student.

published.description: Indicates whether the result is published.

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: Represents an assignment for a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Assignment entity.

fileUrl.description: URL to access the assignment file.

facultyId.description: Reference to User (Faculty) who created the assignment.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: Represents a student's submission for an assignment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Submission entity.

fileUrl.description: URL to access the submission file.

marksAwarded.description: The marks awarded for the submission.

facultyFeedback.description: Feedback provided by the faculty on the submission.

StudyMaterial.title: StudyMaterial
StudyMaterial.description: Represents study material for a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyMaterial entity.

title.description: The title of the study material.

description.description: A description of the study material.

fileUrl.description: URL to access the study material file.

uploadDate.description: The date the study material was uploaded.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents an announcement within the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Announcement entity.

targetAudience.description: The target audience for the announcement (e.g., all, students, faculty).

Forum.title: Forum
Forum.description: Represents a forum for a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Forum entity.

createdAt.description: The date and time the forum was created.

ForumPost.title: ForumPost
ForumPost.description: Represents a post within a forum.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ForumPost entity.

userName.description: The name of the user who created the post (denormalized).

content.description: The content of the forum post.

postedAt.description: The date and time the post was created.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents an event organized by the college.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

organizer.description: The organizer of the event (e.g., club, department).

Club.title: Club
Club.description: Represents a club within the college.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Club entity.

members.description: A list of student UIDs who are members of the club.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

read.description: Indicates whether the notification has been read.

createdAt.description: The date and time the notification was created.

AttendanceSession.title: AttendanceSession
AttendanceSession.description: Represents a single class session for taking attendance via QR code.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AttendanceSession entity.

courseId.description: Reference to the Course for this session.

facultyId.description: Reference to the User (Faculty) who initiated the session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the session was created.

attendees.description: A list of student UIDs who have successfully scanned the QR code for this session.

CorrectionRequest.title: CorrectionRequest
CorrectionRequest.description: Represents a student's request to correct an attendance record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CorrectionRequest entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the User (Student) making the request.

courseId.description: Reference to the Course for which the correction is requested.

attendanceId.description: Reference to the specific Attendance record to be corrected.

attendanceDate.description: The date of the attendance record being corrected (denormalized).

originalStatus.description: The original status of the attendance record (e.g., 'absent').

reason.description: The reason provided by the student for the correction.

status.description: The current status of the request.

requestedAt.description: The timestamp when the request was submitted.

resolvedAt.description: The timestamp when the request was resolved.

resolverId.description: Reference to the User (Faculty/Admin) who resolved the request.

resolverComments.description: Comments from the faculty/admin who resolved the request.

Fee.title: Fee
Fee.description: Represents a fee owed by a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Fee entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the User (Student) who owes the fee.

description.description: A description of the fee (e.g., Tuition Fee - Fall 2024).

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the fee.

amountPaid.description: The amount that has been paid.

dueDate.description: The date the fee is due.

status.description: The current status of the fee.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HelpdeskTicket entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the User (Student) who created the ticket.

studentName.description: Denormalized name of the student for easy display.

category.description: The category of the support ticket.

subject.description: The subject line of the ticket.

description.description: The detailed description of the issue.

status.description: The current status of the ticket.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the ticket was created.

resolvedAt.description: The timestamp when the ticket was resolved.

resolvedBy.description: Reference to the User (Faculty/Admin) who resolved the ticket.

resolverComments.description: Comments from the faculty/admin who resolved the ticket.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user data.  Path-based ownership.  Each user can only read/write their own document.

/users/{userId}/enrollments/{enrollmentI.description: Stores enrollment data for a specific user. Path-based ownership: user can only read/write enrollments associated with their user ID.

/users/{userId}/attendance/{attendanceId.description: Stores attendance data for a specific user. Path-based ownership, only faculty or admins should be able to create/update attendance, students can only view their own.

/courses/{courseId}/timetables/{timetabl.description: Stores timetable data for a specific course.

/users/{userId}/results/{resultId}.description: Stores result data for a specific user. Path-based ownership, but faculty/admin need write access.

/courses/{courseId}/assignments/{assignm.description: Stores assignment data for a specific course.
Stores submission data for a specific assignment within a course.

/courses/{courseId}/study_materials/{stu.description: Stores study material data for a specific course.

/courses/{courseId}/forums/{forumId}.description: Stores forum data for a specific course.

/courses/{courseId}/forums/{forumId}/for.description: Stores forum posts for a specific forum. Includes denormalized 'members' map for authorization independence.

/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificat.description: Stores notifications for a specific user. Path-based ownership; users can only access their own notifications.

/users/{userId}/fees/{feeId}.description: Stores fee data for a specific user. Path-based ownership.

/attendanceSessions/{sessionId}.description: Stores live attendance data for a class session. Created by faculty, updated by students.

/correctionRequests/{requestId}.description: Stores student-submitted requests for attendance corrections. Students can create, faculty/admins can read and update.

/helpdeskTickets/{ticketId}.description: Stores student helpdesk tickets. Students can create for themselves. Admins/Faculty can view all and resolve.
